sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88909" key="prosdii/sthmi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσδι-ίστημι</orth>, <sense id="n88909.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">separate, dilate, widen further</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐπὶ μεῖζον πλάτος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:10:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.10.14</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τραύματα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
